user.title: NBPower EV Charger
user.description: Enter the MAC address of your charger. Find it in the NBPowen app or via nRF Connect.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the MAC address and make sure the charger is powered on and nearby.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Example: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Power on the charger and make sure Bluetooth is enabled.

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured in Home Assistant.
